message:
fix(doc): fix 3 failing doc tests in ewma.rs and token_bucket.rs

- ewma::Ewma: pass f64 literal (1000.0) instead of integer to with_half_life_ms
- ewma::RateEstimator: pass f64 literal (5000.0) instead of integer
- token_bucket::HierarchicalBucket: use .is_allowed() since try_acquire
  returns HierarchicalResult, not bool

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
